holdings.infoBox: DUST is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 68.20%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 40.38%, Cash at 19.09%, Vaneck Vectors Gold Miners Etf Swap at 5.95%, and Vaneck Vectors Gold Miners Etf Swap at 3.59%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bear 2X ETF (DUST) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MarketVector Global Gold Miners index. The fund provides 2x inverse exposure to a modified market capitalization-weighted index of global gold and silver mining firms. DUST was launched on Dec 8, 2010 and is issued by Direxion.
